pi_items.source: Clinical reference values for adult cerebellar vermis height (e.g., PMID: 26812238, PMC4727931)
Standard clinical thresholds for cerebellar vermis hypoplasia (CVH) in adults

privileged_info_summary: The clinical thresholds for the cerebellar vermis assessment are 25 mm for the minimum normal diameter and 18 mm for the minimum borderline diameter.
